section_miscategorizations.text: A debridement will be performed to remove necrotic tissue.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The Findings section explicitly states that no signs of necrosis were observed, yet the Plan includes debridement to remove necrotic tissue. If necrotic tissue is present, it should be documented as an exam/wound finding; if it is not present, the rationale in the Plan is misleading. As written, this creates a contradictory and clinically confusing placement of information about tissue status between Findings and Plan.
